headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -99.9)
key_insights: Fears trending up 46% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 192 quotes and an exceptional intensity split — 171 of those are strong, which is driving the score sharply higher to 97.9.
• This frustration level sits in the upper third of the 161-day range, well above the near-zero floor, though still some distance from the all-time peak of 167.3.
• Optimism recovered notably from yesterday's record low of -65.8, while Fears edged slightly less negative — both remain subdued but are moving in a better direction.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
